# 新闻速递 2026-03-16

## TikTok
- 传TikTok美国业务出售或为美国带来100亿美元收入，预示其潜在商业价值。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxPZTRCLTV0dzlJZnlLamFRRVpFRGRkTGdOUjR3ay04VHpabHVhOXh1NlpXMkVGck5mWmJrWWNEQ0tnU0lrRmVLd2pVNWRDaTlDQ2YyMEZqeTJrelRPM21Xd3FHa3RkVzdVcjFPaDlnMWlCVTRwWWxTbHJ0cXpBa3dDcDJmblFqLWd5OHVYNUhGajNPMTc4Q1VlbkJGMkdkRTFROFJwOWh3?oc=5)）
- 传投资者财团将向美国政府支付100亿美元作为TikTok美国业务交易费，凸显其交易背后的复杂利益。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxQVHh4a0x4bV9CRy1lSjZya1RDSk5XVk1PeFoxNG42dzNVVkM1ckZ2c2lZRzBVenRXLWJiZFF3RGdTandSSTlDSVprOC1reXVUYU84RWFwX3Q1MWF1VWVNWTV0VFhDSzlKYWlNckJXbU5OYk5SNVFlOVJ2Z1dxcl9NNEZmX1lZT3l2QWtJRVkwMFM5YlBjeW5KTDJtMVlUVUdkZmtHenJUMXk3M2dOcHh6bnlTTXNlM2FK0gG-AUFVX3lxTE5YLWJ3bEctNS1KcjhpRUhJMjBTNEhDZmZoU2VhdTRvM3JLeVBoNUZNa0d1enpHcTRhS2FYNDhRdzNORkpKM3ZXWjRQelhwTkxOcDF2TDIxNjVCbmRrV1FhaE5adFBhX1BIa3V3ZW1hSDhkMV9TRFYtemRCQUZoWk9FYlZ0WHRwTnYwdTBJOW4zakxLZ3BJdUxXYnNwY212dzVzVk54SnZaNVo1dzVvcm50d3RBOFRiNk16bGxEY2c?oc=5)）
- 特朗普政府将从TikTok美国业务收购中收取100亿美元费用，确认交易价值及政府在并购中的话语权。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxPa2RsaVpoRXNfaE91LXE3c1l4b1JXWXFnYkhQT2RwNXFYeDlxbjJJLXdQekFUanZGcnhiaVpvT2Ytd3hjaHQzblNrOGozUDg0Q3U0VmFOb2ZnZi1Ld3YxdFBDMmg1azVTLVM3SlB2dXZzdE9OX1paNEFEak1FeENfZC1zSm9TNGppa19fcGlhVXZfU21pY05JcG1SRVM2VFY0NDNjdHJtS1F6QQ?oc=5)）

## Coupang
- 韩国劳动部就Coupang员工死亡涉嫌掩盖真相启动调查，或损害公司声誉并引发劳工实践担忧。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre财报后股价暴跌，引发市场对其是低位买入还是风险避退的争论。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxPYzF4NWQ3eXFzUHJoUlgteUR5aGhFclRpakZ1VldoRG9ER1BQNUxCV0gya1ZPSllPTjBLajhXeEFRQlcwd3BPaC1kZGk3SFNpR2E2WmVDaGRLRWY0eWZTN09hM2FXSWFveGlPUU5NazNlenVVeVFYcEhycXJoSVJ2SnVsTVpNLWlhMlNUeWRYSmRqYWltRUtMLQ?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre 2026年第一季度业绩因利润率压力股价下跌，凸显公司盈利能力面临挑战。（[news.google.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxPLW1maG1vYTFKNWVYaURqWTFnVVdkRTJGN1BhaFhkMDNtTmgxcERLUDZ1ZzE0YUZNZVhYOE5NWjY5cWt0a2d1Vzl0NGZFTnN6TFlrZHp1RW51bUNfWnFsZ2dQTHZTRTRoRmtTbXJIRzl0RWprS1czMmVPU0pzT3Fuc0hRN1NjUVF4LXczbkxLaktUNzlxMFZGV09zWFhzcFIyc2hfZWZpQWh1cnc5Snp3?oc=5)）
